title: Bat Removal & Exclusion in Somers, NY | $900-$2,500 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional bat removal and exclusion services in Somers, Westchester. Humane, effective solutions for homes and properties. Licensed experts. Call today for a free estimate!
intro: Somers, NY homeowners face unique bat intrusion challenges due to the area's wooded properties and historic structures. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive bat removal and exclusion services throughout Somers, ensuring your home remains bat-free while adhering to all wildlife protection regulations. Our experienced technicians safely remove bats and seal entry points to prevent future infestations.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of wildlife management experience to Somers residents, combining humane removal techniques with permanent exclusion solutions. Our licensed professionals understand Westchester County's specific bat species and provide guaranteed workmanship with every service.
localContext: Somers' beautiful estates, properties near Muscoot Farm, and homes along the historic Route 202 corridor provide ideal roosting spots for bats seeking shelter in attics, chimneys, and soffits. The area's mature trees and proximity to reservoirs create perfect bat habitats, making professional exclusion essential for protecting your property value and family's health.

faqs.question: What does bat exclusion involve in Somers homes?
faqs.answer: Bat exclusion involves a thorough inspection to identify all entry points, installation of one-way exit devices that allow bats to leave but not return, sealing all gaps and openings (often in soffits, vents, and chimneys), and cleanup of guano if necessary. We follow New York State guidelines to ensure humane, legal removal while permanently solving your bat problem.

faqs.question: Why does bat removal cost $900-$2,500 in Somers?
faqs.answer: Pricing depends on the size of the bat colony, number of entry points, accessibility of roosting areas, and extent of exclusion work needed. Smaller jobs on ranch homes may cost around $900, while larger estates with multiple entry points, extensive attic areas, or significant guano cleanup can reach $2,500. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates before any work begins.

faqs.question: When is bat removal season in Somers, NY?
faqs.answer: Bat exclusion in New York cannot be performed during maternity season (approximately May 1 through August 15) when flightless pups could be trapped inside. The best times for bat removal in Somers are spring (before May) and fall (after mid-August). However, we can inspect and plan your exclusion strategy year-round.

faqs.question: Are bats in my Somers attic dangerous?
faqs.answer: While bats are beneficial for insect control, having them in your home poses health risks through guano accumulation (which can harbor histoplasmosis), potential rabies exposure, and structural damage from urine and droppings. Immediate professional removal protects your family's health and prevents costly damage to insulation and woodwork.
